---
title: "Literature Review"
bibliography: references.bib
---

## Introduction

This section synthesizes key literature relevant to the thesis research.

## Theoretical Framework

### Key Concepts

1. **Concept One**: Description and importance
2. **Concept Two**: Theoretical foundations  
3. **Concept Three**: Application to research

## Major Themes

### Theme 1: [Topic Area]

Key papers and findings in this area...

::: {.callout-note}
## Important Study
Author et al. (2023) found that... [Add citation when you have references.bib]
:::

### Theme 2: [Topic Area]

Recent developments include...

### Theme 3: [Topic Area]

Critical perspectives on...

## Research Gaps

Current literature shows several gaps:

1. Limited research on [specific area]
2. Need for more [methodological approach]
3. Insufficient attention to [topic]

## How This Research Contributes

This thesis addresses the identified gaps by:

- Contribution 1
- Contribution 2
- Contribution 3

## Key Papers

| Authors | Year | Title | Key Finding |
|---------|------|-------|-------------|
| Smith et al. | 2023 | Example Paper | Finding 1 |
| Jones & Brown | 2022 | Another Study | Finding 2 |
| Davis | 2021 | Important Work | Finding 3 |

## References

References will appear here when you add citations to your `references.bib` file.
